creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
There is no http://http.debian.net in bsd.sites.mk, which make portlint can not detect porter's misuse of this URL instead of using DEBIAN MACRO.

the maintainer of portlint advice to open a PR to add http://http.debian.net to bsd.sites.mk. More info: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220501
